title: Founder, Chief Executive Officer, and Cognitive Architect
summary: Artan Davoodi leads Neuroartan as the founder and chief executive officer while defining the product doctrine, continuity architecture, and institutional posture of ICOS.
biography: Artan Davoodi is the founder of Neuroartan and the primary architect of ICOS as a voice-trained reflective cognition system.
His work centers on continuity, profile fidelity, structured reflection, and the translation of human observation into governed product architecture.
The founder surface is presented as an institutional trust layer rather than as a personality wrapper over generic AI.
